products.title: Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max (Titanium Blue, 512GB)
products.description: The pinnacle of mobile engineering. Powered by the A17 Pro chip, featuring a lightweight titanium design, a custom Action button, and a professional 5x Telephoto optical zoom camera.

products.title: Apple MacBook Pro 16" (M3 Max, 36GB Unified Memory, 1TB SSD)
products.description: The ultimate creative powerhouse. Experience a breathtaking Liquid Retina XDR screen, studio-quality six-speaker spatial audio, and unprecedented battery life powered by advanced Apple Silicon.

products.title: Sony BRAVIA XR A95L 65" 4K QD-OLED Smart TV
products.description: Our brightest and widest colors ever in a QD-OLED panel, powered by the ground-breaking Cognitive Processor XR. Transform your living room into an immersive cinema.

products.title: Martin D-28 Dreadnought Acoustic Guitar
products.description: The standard by which all acoustic guitars are measured. Handcrafted in Nazareth, Pennsylvania, with a solid Sitka spruce top and East Indian rosewood back and sides.

products.title: Yamaha Clavinova CLP-735 Digital Console Piano
products.description: Features the meticulously sampled voices of the flagship Yamaha CFX and Bösendorfer Imperial grand pianos, with a synthetic ebony and ivory GrandTouch-S keyboard.

products.title: SMEG FAB32 50s Retro Style Refrigerator (Cream)
products.description: An iconic Italian masterpiece combining nostalgic mid-century aesthetic on the outside with hyper-efficient multi-flow cooling and touch-screen temperature controls on the inside.

products.title: Miele W1 Front-Loading Washing Machine with TwinDos
products.description: German-engineered washing machine featuring the revolutionary TwinDos automatic liquid detergent dispensing system and an eco-silent wash profile.

products.title: Harry & David Royal Riviera Pears Gourmet Gift Basket
products.description: Legendary sweet, exceptionally juicy Riviera pears, hand-packed and paired with artisanal cheeses, premium roasted cashews, and rich chocolate truffles.

products.title: Farm-to-Table Organic Microgreens & Heirloom Greens Harvest
products.description: Crisp certified-organic heritage lettuces, baby spinach, watercress, edible flowers, and fresh culinary herbs harvested daily from local high-altitude biodynamic farms.

products.title: Maison Francis Kurkdjian Baccarat Rouge 540 Eau de Parfum
products.description: Luminous and sophisticated, Baccarat Rouge 540 lays on the skin like an amber, floral and woody breeze. A poetic alchemy where aerial notes of jasmine and saffron excel.

products.title: Loro Piana Sartorial Linen & Silk Summer Blazer
products.description: Impeccably tailored in Italy from a luxurious blend of hand-selected linen and mulberry silk. Features a soft shoulder, partial lining, and a sophisticated navy hue.

products.title: Zimmermann Ginger Floral Embroidered Silk Midi Dress
products.description: Crafted from lightweight silk georgette in an exquisite bohemian silhouette. Adorned with delicate embroidery, placement prints, and a high elegant neckline.

products.title: Rolex Cosmograph Daytona (18kt Yellow Gold & Oysterflex)
products.description: The ultimate luxury racing chronograph. Features a stunning black dial with champagne sub-dials, high-performance Oysterflex strap, and self-winding caliber 4130 movement.

products.title: Saint Laurent Loulou Medium Suede Shoulder Bag
products.description: An iconic French heirloom. Beautifully crafted from supple textured calfskin suede with signature Y-quilted overstitching and interlocking metal YSL initials.
